# CWE-1230 negative: metadata stripped from response (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1230-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1230 mitigated: response omits filename, size, and other derived metadata.

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
)

func DownloadRedactedSafePure() http.HandlerFunc {
	base := "/var/vault/documents"
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		name := r.URL.Query().Get("name")
		path := filepath.Join(base, name)
		if _, err := os.Stat(path); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, "missing", http.StatusNotFound)
			return
		}
		w.Header().Set("Cache-Control", "no-store")
		w.Write([]byte("[REDACTED CONTENT]"))
	}
}
